# SOURCE_OF_TRUTH_MANIFEST

## Primary system flow
1. intelligence system:

3. execution system:

## Shared operating law
- keep architecture unchanged in production
- preserve continuity from prior pass
- keep missing fields blank instead of fabricating
- preserve staging-first and hold-before-final-write behavior
- maintain logs, run ledgers, blockers, next actions, and recovery notes

## Source of truth by category
| Category | Source of Truth | Fallback | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| prompts | | | |
| schedules | | | |
| runtime state | | | |
| client config | | | |
| final writes | | | |
